name: system.theme
description: Color theme: system, light, or dark (default: system)

name: system.default-view
description: Name of the view to open on startup (default: home)

name: system.backup.interval-hours
description: How often to back up agent.db in hours (default: 24)

name: system.backup.max-count
description: Maximum number of backups to keep (default: 5)

name: system.cleanup.session-retention-days
description: Delete sessions older than this many days, 0 = keep forever (default: 30)

name: system.cleanup.task-log-retention-days
description: Delete task logs older than this many days, 0 = keep forever (default: 30)

name: system.http-api.port
description: Preferred port for the local HTTP API server, restart required (default: 9877)

name: system.provider
description: Active provider ID (default: openai-compatible)

name: system.openai-compatible-provider.api-key
description: API key for the built-in OpenAI-compatible provider

name: system.openai-compatible-provider.model-id
description: Model ID for the built-in provider (default: deepseek/deepseek-v3.2)

name: system.openai-compatible-provider.base-url
description: Base URL for the built-in provider (default: https://openrouter.ai/api)

name: system.openai-compatible-provider.reasoning
description: Reasoning effort level: off, minimal, low, medium, high, xhigh (default: off)

name: system.show-tab-source
description: Show each tab's source (view name, file path, or URL) on a second line under the title (default: false)

name: system.shortcuts.toggle-command-palette
description: Shortcut for Command Palette (default: mod+k). Set to 'disabled' to unbind.

name: system.shortcuts.toggle-agent-chat
description: Shortcut for Toggle AI Panel (default: mod+i). Set to 'disabled' to unbind.

name: system.shortcuts.toggle-task-panel
description: Shortcut for Toggle Task Panel (default: mod+j). Set to 'disabled' to unbind.

name: system.shortcuts.close-current-tab
description: Shortcut for Close Current Tab (default: mod+w). Set to 'disabled' to unbind.

name: system.shortcuts.reload-current-tab
description: Shortcut for Reload Current Tab (default: mod+r). Set to 'disabled' to unbind.

name: system.shortcuts.reload-window
description: Shortcut for Reload Window (default: mod+shift+r). Set to 'disabled' to unbind.

name: system.shortcuts.add-agent
description: Shortcut for Add Agent (default: mod+o). Set to 'disabled' to unbind.

name: system.shortcuts.new-session
description: Shortcut for New Session (default: mod+t). Set to 'disabled' to unbind.

name: system.shortcuts.switch-to-tab-1
description: Shortcut for Switch to Tab 1 (default: mod+1). Set to 'disabled' to unbind.

name: system.shortcuts.switch-to-tab-2
description: Shortcut for Switch to Tab 2 (default: mod+2). Set to 'disabled' to unbind.

name: system.shortcuts.switch-to-tab-3
description: Shortcut for Switch to Tab 3 (default: mod+3). Set to 'disabled' to unbind.

name: system.shortcuts.switch-to-tab-4
description: Shortcut for Switch to Tab 4 (default: mod+4). Set to 'disabled' to unbind.

name: system.shortcuts.switch-to-tab-5
description: Shortcut for Switch to Tab 5 (default: mod+5). Set to 'disabled' to unbind.

name: system.shortcuts.switch-to-tab-6
description: Shortcut for Switch to Tab 6 (default: mod+6). Set to 'disabled' to unbind.

name: system.shortcuts.switch-to-tab-7
description: Shortcut for Switch to Tab 7 (default: mod+7). Set to 'disabled' to unbind.

name: system.shortcuts.switch-to-tab-8
description: Shortcut for Switch to Tab 8 (default: mod+8). Set to 'disabled' to unbind.

name: system.shortcuts.switch-to-tab-9
description: Shortcut for Switch to Tab 9 (default: mod+9). Set to 'disabled' to unbind.

name: system.shortcuts.previous-tab
description: Shortcut for Previous Tab (default: mod+shift+[). Set to 'disabled' to unbind.

name: system.shortcuts.next-tab
description: Shortcut for Next Tab (default: mod+shift+]). Set to 'disabled' to unbind.

name: system.shortcuts.next-agent
description: Shortcut for Next Agent (default: ctrl+tab). Set to 'disabled' to unbind.

name: system.shortcuts.previous-agent
description: Shortcut for Previous Agent (default: ctrl+shift+tab). Set to 'disabled' to unbind.

name: system.shortcuts.search-views
description: Shortcut for Search Views (default: mod+p). Set to 'disabled' to unbind.

name: system.shortcuts.open-settings
description: Shortcut for Open Settings (default: mod+,). Set to 'disabled' to unbind.

name: system.shortcuts.toggle-dev-tools
description: Shortcut for Toggle Developer Tools (default: alt+mod+i). Set to 'disabled' to unbind.
